description:
Description: As a new user, I want to create an account by providing my personal details (username, email, password, etc.) so that I can access the application with secure credentials.
Acceptance Criteria
- Successful Account Creation
- Given valid input (username, email, password)
- When the user submits the form
- Then the system should create the account and return a success message.
- Mandatory Fields Validation
- If any required field is missing, the system should display an error message.
- Unique Constraints
- If the email or username already exists, the system should prevent creation and show "User already exists".
- Password Policy Enforcement
- Password must be at least 8 characters, contain 1 uppercase, 1 number, and 1 special character.
- Email Format Validation
- Invalid email formats should be rejected with "Invalid email format".
- Default Role Assignment
- If no role is specified, assign "user" by default.
- Audit Logging
- Log account creation events with user ID, timestamp, and origin.
